metadata.research_depth_notes: Deep crawl across Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, LinkedIn, Google Maps, startup directories (Fashyas, BizDireNepal, InfluencerNepal, TheBuzzNepal), and direct profile inspection. Searched over 50 targeted queries for Nepal-based social-commerce businesses. Cross-referenced usernames across platforms. Inspected bios, Linktree usage, DM-ordering patterns, website existence, and engagement quality. Prioritized businesses with high social signals but weak web presence.

businesses.description: Kathmandu-based clothing brand selling primarily via Instagram; bio states orders are taken only on Instagram and shipping is worldwide. No official website.

website.quality_analysis: No website found. Business listing on Fashyas confirms no website; relies on Instagram DM for orders.

website_need_signals: Bio states orders are taken only via Instagram
No official website or product catalog
High demand handled through DMs
businesses.observations: Large Instagram following but ordering is still DM-based, which limits scale. An e-commerce site would improve ordering and fulfillment.

businesses.description: Pokhara-based boutique selling traditional Gurung dresses and ethnic wear. Bio lists Soondar Marga, Pokhara with worldwide shipping; orders via Instagram DM and phone.

website.quality_analysis: No website found. Relies on Instagram and phone orders. Listed on Instagram with phone number and DM instructions.

website_need_signals: Orders handled via Instagram DM
Phone number listed for orders
No centralized product catalog
businesses.observations: Traditional wear boutique with international shipping but no online store. A catalog and checkout would reduce manual order handling.

businesses.description: Handicrafts store in Nepal focused on handmade items promoted via Instagram.

website.quality_analysis: Site uses bot protection; content not verifiable from here.

website_need_signals: Website content not accessible due to bot protection
No verified online storefront details available
businesses.observations: Instagram shows a handicrafts store, but the website could not be verified due to bot protection.

businesses.description: Wedding cake specialists since 1989 offering custom cakes and fresh bakes. Orders are handled by DM or phone; urgent orders list local phone numbers and Viber contact.

website.quality_analysis: No website found. Business is listed on directories like Wanderlog and Foursquare but has no official web presence. Orders placed in-person or via phone.

website_need_signals: No official website for online ordering
Orders handled by phone or DM
Relies on social profiles and directories
businesses.observations: Well-known bakery; Viber contact 9841224345 for urgent orders. A website with online ordering would reduce manual coordination.

businesses.description: Certified personal trainer using Instagram for coaching inquiries. Bio highlights DM for personal training and collaboration; personal account listed as @sudristishilpakar.

website.quality_analysis: No website found. Relies on Instagram for client acquisition and YouTube for workout content. No centralized booking or payment system.

website_need_signals: DM for Personal Training and Collaboration in bio
No booking system for sessions
No payment gateway for online coaching packages
businesses.observations: Certified fitness instructor with growing online presence. A professional website with booking, payment, and client management would transform her DM-based inquiry system into a scalable online coaching business.

businesses.description: European Bakery with branches in Kathmandu and Lalitpur and online ordering on europeanbakery.com.np.

website.quality_analysis: Official website with online ordering and branch locations.

businesses.observations: Active website with online ordering and branch locations.

businesses.description: Trekking agency offering Nepal itineraries with an active website and WhatsApp contact for inquiries.

website.quality_analysis: Active website with itineraries, pricing, and booking links.

businesses.observations: Active website and social channels; bookings can be routed from Instagram to the site.

businesses.description: Handicraft maker Renuka Shrestha, injured in a cooking gas leak, runs Renuka Creation and sells handmade products via social media; exports within Nepal and abroad.

website.quality_analysis: No verified official website found.

website_need_signals: Orders come via social media (Facebook, TikTok, Instagram)
No verified official website
businesses.observations: Featured in Ekantipur (2024) for overcoming burn injuries and building Renuka Creation; sales remain social-media driven.

businesses.description: Women-led, LGBTIQ+ friendly travel company offering tours and treks with a focus on sustainable tourism and local immersion.

website.quality_analysis: Active website with tours, articles, and inquiry forms.

website_need_signals: Website relies on inquiry forms for bookings
No direct online payment visible
businesses.observations: Active website and social presence; online inquiries can be routed through the site.

businesses.description: Fairtrade handmade felt products from Nepal promoted via the founder account @soohme_ and the brand handle @soohme_shop; sales run through Instagram.
website_need_signals: 47K+ followers but no website
No product catalog or online store
Fair trade brand losing sales to lack of checkout
businesses.observations: High-potential lead with massive following and zero web presence. A professional e-commerce site would unlock significant revenue from existing audience. Fair trade angle provides strong brand positioning.

businesses.description: A Lalitpur-based bakery offering custom cakes and fresh bakes with online delivery across Kathmandu and Lalitpur. Uses WhatsApp and phone calls for orders.

website.quality_analysis: No website found. Business listed on BizDireNepal with WhatsApp and call ordering details. No online menu or ordering platform.

website_need_signals: WhatsApp and call ordering only
BizDireNepal listing compensates for lack of website
Delivers across Kathmandu Valley but no order tracking
businesses.observations: Delivery-focused bakery with no order management system. A website with menu, customization options, and online payment would streamline operations and reduce manual order-taking workload.

businesses.description: A Nepal-based clothing retailer operating through Instagram and Facebook with limited physical presence in Bardiya District. Takes orders via DM and delivers all over Nepal.

website.quality_analysis: No website found. Listed on PinkBazaar.in as DM-to-order business with nationwide delivery but no e-commerce platform.

website_need_signals: DM via Instagram or Facebook for orders
Nationwide delivery but no checkout system
PinkBazaar listing acts as proxy website
businesses.observations: Regional clothing brand with national delivery ambitions but manual ordering bottleneck. An e-commerce site with COD integration would be transformative for scaling beyond Bardiya.

businesses.description: The first Korean restaurant in Bhaktapur, serving traditional Korean cuisine alongside Nepali flavors. Uses Instagram to showcase menu items and takes orders through a separate menu page.

website.quality_analysis: No website found. Menu shared via separate Instagram account @menu.nepal. No online ordering or reservation system.

website_need_signals: Menu hosted on separate Instagram account
No online reservation or ordering
First Korean restaurant in Bhaktapur but no web presence
businesses.observations: Unique Korean restaurant concept in Bhaktapur with novelty appeal. A website with menu, location, and reservation system would professionalize their operation and attract tourists visiting Bhaktapur.

businesses.business_name: One O One Coffee & Barista School
businesses.description: A barista training school and coffee shop in Bhaktapur offering certification courses. Uses Instagram to showcase student work and promote courses, with phone-based enrollment.

website.quality_analysis: No website found. Phone numbers in Instagram posts for enrollment. No online course catalog or registration system.

website_need_signals: Phone numbers in posts for enrollment
No online registration or course catalog
No digital payment system for course fees
businesses.observations: Niche training school with no digital enrollment system. A website with course listings, student galleries, online registration, and payment would attract students beyond Bhaktapur.

businesses.description: An upcoming unisex salon in Kathmandu offering hair, makeup, and beauty services. Uses Instagram to showcase work but booking process is manual via phone or DM.

website.quality_analysis: No website found. Contact via phone and email. No online booking system despite being a salon.

website_need_signals: No online appointment booking
Phone-based reservation only
Instagram showcases work but cannot book
businesses.observations: Salon with professional branding and email contact but no booking website. A booking system with service menu, pricing, and online appointments would reduce phone workload and improve customer experience.

businesses.description: A Nepali fashion brand offering traditional and contemporary sari, anarkali outfits reflecting Nepali cultural heritage. Uses Instagram for showcasing new arrivals and engaging with customers.

website.quality_analysis: No website found. Lemon8 profile describes active Instagram presence for exploring new arrivals and engaging directly for personalized service.

website_need_signals: Personalized service via Instagram engagement
No e-commerce for traditional wear
Lemon8 profile as makeshift catalog
businesses.observations: Traditional fashion brand with cultural niche. An e-commerce site with size guides, festival collections, and online ordering would serve the Nepali diaspora globally.

businesses.description: An Instagram community page with 60K+ followers promoting authentic eco-friendly Nepali products to global markets. Operates as a marketplace connecting artisans with buyers via Instagram.

website.quality_analysis: No website found despite massive following. Operates purely as an Instagram community. No e-commerce or marketplace website.

website_need_signals: 60K+ community but no marketplace website
Connecting global buyers manually via Instagram
No product listings or shopping cart
businesses.observations: Dream lead with huge engaged audience and no web infrastructure. A multi-vendor marketplace or e-commerce site would transform this community into a revenue-generating platform for Nepali artisans globally.

businesses.description: A tutoring service offering various tuition classes with expert teachers. Uses Facebook and Instagram pages to attract students, with contact via social media.

website.quality_analysis: No website found. Listed on MeroTutor directory. No online course catalog or enrollment system.

website_need_signals: MeroTutor listing as only web presence
No online enrollment or course info
Social media only contact method
businesses.observations: Small tuition center with basic social presence. A simple landing page with course listings, teacher profiles, and WhatsApp contact button would provide legitimacy and attract more students.

businesses.description: An online cake delivery service covering Kathmandu, Bhaktapur, and Lalitpur. Takes orders via their website and social media, offering convenient cake purchasing without visiting shops.

website.quality_analysis: Brandfetch listing suggests a website exists but not prominent. Primarily social-media driven sales with delivery service.

website_need_signals: Website not prominently featured
Social media as primary sales channel
Delivery service could benefit from better online ordering
businesses.observations: Cake delivery business with multi-city coverage. A proper e-commerce site with cake customization, delivery scheduling, and online payment would professionalize their delivery service.

businesses.description: A Nepali clothing brand creating handcrafted garments with cultural statements, made in Nepal with purpose-driven design. Uses Instagram and Facebook to showcase collections.

website.quality_analysis: No website found. Operates through Facebook and Instagram. Posts emphasize handcrafted quality and cultural significance.

website_need_signals: No e-commerce platform for cultural clothing
Facebook page is primary web presence
Purpose-driven brand story not leveraged online
businesses.observations: Cultural clothing brand with compelling narrative but no web presence. A website with brand story, lookbook, and e-commerce would elevate the brand beyond social media.

businesses.description: A competitive powerlifting athlete and personal trainer who won Strongest Woman in Nepal title. Inspires women through fitness reels and training content on Instagram.

website.quality_analysis: No website found. Fitness influencer with strong engagement but no platform for coaching services or merchandise.

website_need_signals: Strong engagement but no coaching platform
No booking system for personal training
Title holder with no brand monetization website
businesses.observations: Title-winning athlete with strong personal brand but no monetization platform. A website offering online coaching, merchandise, and event bookings would capitalize on her Strongest Woman in Nepal fame.

businesses.description: An online and physical tuition center founded by Nagendra Dhimal offering expert-led classes from grades 11 to master's level. Uses a basic website and Facebook for student outreach.

website.quality_analysis: Basic personal website of founder, not a dedicated tuition platform. Lacks course catalog, online enrollment, or payment integration.

website_need_signals: Founder's personal site, not a tuition platform
No online course enrollment
YouTube content not monetized through own platform
businesses.observations: Educational content creator with YouTube presence but no dedicated learning platform. An LMS website with course enrollment, payment, and content delivery would scale his teaching business.

businesses.description: A professional photography and 3D/360 virtual tour studio founded by a diploma-holding photographer. Serves individuals, businesses, museums, and government organizations.

website.quality_analysis: Website is a Websoft Nepal corporate page, not a dedicated photography portfolio. No proper portfolio gallery or booking system.

website_need_signals: No dedicated photography portfolio website
Corporate page not suited for photography business
No online booking or quote request system
businesses.observations: Professional photographer with corporate and government clients but no portfolio website. A stunning visual portfolio with service listings and booking would significantly upgrade their professional image.

businesses.description: A photography studio in Kathmandu offering professional photography services. Uses Instagram to showcase work but details are sparse online.

website.quality_analysis: No dedicated photography portfolio website found. Google listing exists but no official site.

website_need_signals: Google Maps listing without website link
No portfolio gallery online
Instagram as sole showcase platform
businesses.observations: Small photography studio with minimal online presence. A portfolio website with booking and pricing would establish credibility and attract higher-value clients.

businesses.description: A brand specializing in ethically sourced raw crystals from the Himalayas, offering handcrafted jewelry in pure silver and Panchadhatu. Rooted in Nepali craftsmanship.

website.quality_analysis: No website found. Featured in The Buzz Nepal for craftsmanship but operates solely through Instagram.

website_need_signals: Featured in media but no website to capture interest
Ethically sourced story not leveraged on own domain
Instagram-only sales despite premium positioning
businesses.observations: Premium crystal jewelry brand with media coverage but no e-commerce. A website with product stories, ethical sourcing narrative, and online store would attract international buyers.

businesses.description: A learning and training center wing of Kaasthamandap Vidhyalaya offering educational courses and training programs. Has a basic website but primarily uses Facebook for outreach.

website.quality_analysis: Website exists as a subdirectory of main school site. Basic, lacks dedicated training center branding and online enrollment.

website_need_signals: Website is a subdirectory, not a dedicated platform
No online course enrollment system
Facebook as primary communication channel
businesses.observations: Established training center with weak digital presence. A dedicated website with course catalog, online enrollment, and student portal would modernize their operations.

businesses.description: A bakery with over 4 decades of operation in Kathmandu, offering cakes, pastries, and baked goods. Has a basic website for online ordering but primarily relies on social media.

website.quality_analysis: Basic website with ordering guide but limited functionality. Not a full e-commerce experience; more of an informational site with manual ordering steps.

website_need_signals: Website exists but requires manual ordering steps
Not a full e-commerce experience
Social media engagement higher than website functionality
businesses.observations: Established bakery with decades of reputation but underdeveloped website. Upgrading to full e-commerce with online payment and delivery scheduling would match their legacy brand status.

businesses.description: A popular bakery among young food lovers in Kathmandu, known for quick bites and custom cakes. Uses Instagram for marketing but ordering is in-person or via phone.

website.quality_analysis: No website found. Featured in The Buzz Nepal as a popular spot but no online ordering platform exists.

website_need_signals: Popular among youth but no online ordering
Custom cake orders handled manually
Instagram-worthy food but no website to order from
businesses.observations: Trendy bakery with young audience but no digital ordering. A mobile-friendly ordering website with Instagram integration would directly serve their social-media-savvy customer base.

businesses.description: A photography platform facilitating learning, exhibition-making, and publishing for Nepali photographers. Co-founded in 2007, serves as a community hub for photographers.

website.quality_analysis: Basic website exists but functionality is limited. Primarily informational with event listings but no e-commerce for prints or workshop bookings.

website_need_signals: Website lacks e-commerce for photography prints
No online workshop registration
Community platform not fully digitized
businesses.observations: Established photography community with basic website. Adding print sales, workshop bookings, and member portfolios would transform the platform into a revenue-generating community hub.

businesses.description: A Nepali clothing brand promoting Nepal-made products, providing employment to young women. Has a website but primarily drives sales through Instagram and social media.

website.quality_analysis: Website exists but appears basic. Social mission prominent but e-commerce functionality may be limited.

website_need_signals: Website exists but may lack full e-commerce
Social mission story underleveraged online
Employment initiative could be better showcased
businesses.observations: Social enterprise with strong mission but website may not reflect brand value. A revamped e-commerce site highlighting the women-employment story would differentiate the brand internationally.

businesses.description: An educational company offering courses physically in Kathmandu and online through an app and Facebook live sessions. Uses Facebook as primary platform for live classes.

website.quality_analysis: Basic website exists with terms and conditions. App-based learning but website is primarily informational rather than a learning platform.

website_need_signals: Website is informational only, not a learning platform
Facebook live sessions as primary teaching tool
App exists but web experience is limited
businesses.observations: Ed-tech startup with app but weak web presence. A comprehensive learning platform website with course enrollment, progress tracking, and payment would complement their app strategy.

businesses.description: A men's clothing brand based in Kathmandu, listed on Fashyas with address but no website. Uses Instagram for showcasing products and taking orders.

website.quality_analysis: No website found. Fashyas directory listing confirms no website. Operates through Instagram and physical location.

website_need_signals: Fashyas listing confirms no website
Instagram-only sales channel
Physical location exists but no online store
businesses.observations: Small men's clothing brand with basic social presence. An e-commerce website would expand reach beyond the physical store and Instagram followers.

businesses.description: A beauty brand and salon led by CEO Lemi Tamang, with 389K+ Instagram followers. Offers beauty products and services but web presence is limited.

website.quality_analysis: No website found despite massive following. Email domain pastel-beauty.com exists but no active website. All sales through Instagram.

website_need_signals: 389K+ followers but no website
Email domain exists but no active site
All sales and bookings through Instagram DM
businesses.observations: Dream client with massive audience and zero web presence. A professional e-commerce site with booking system would generate significant revenue. The gap between social following and web infrastructure is enormous.

businesses.description: An event management company working to position Nepal as a premier destination for luxury weddings and high-end events. Brought renowned event designer Edgardo Zamora to Nepal.

website.quality_analysis: No website found despite high-profile events and media coverage. All inquiries via Instagram DM or phone.

website_need_signals: High-profile events but no portfolio website
Media coverage not leveraged on own domain
Luxury positioning undermined by lack of website
businesses.observations: Luxury event company with international ambitions but no portfolio website. A stunning website showcasing past events, client testimonials, and inquiry form would match their luxury positioning.

businesses.description: A self-taught artist from Srinagar running an Instagram-based art venture showcasing calligraphy, wall-hangings, umbrellas, and customized kangris. Sells entirely through Instagram.

website.quality_analysis: No website found. Fully Instagram-dependent art business. Media coverage links to Instagram profile.

website_need_signals: Media coverage directs to Instagram, not website
No e-commerce for art products
Custom orders handled via DM
businesses.observations: Unique art brand with media attention but no sales platform. An e-commerce site with customization options would transform the Instagram following into a sustainable business.

businesses.description: A travel community organizing tours to offbeat locations in Sikkim and Darjeeling. Uses Instagram to showcase destinations and takes inquiries via DM, WhatsApp, or phone.

website.quality_analysis: No website found. Instagram directs to DM/WhatsApp/Call for inquiries. No online booking or itinerary pages.

website_need_signals: DM/WhatsApp/Call as only inquiry methods
No trip itineraries or pricing online
Instagram as sole web presence
businesses.observations: Niche travel operator in Sikkim with no booking website. A site with trip packages, photo galleries, and online booking would capture travelers seeking offbeat experiences.

businesses.description: A beauty salon and makeup academy in Dhanbad offering salon services and makeup courses. Uses Instagram for booking and showcasing work.

website.quality_analysis: No website found. Discount offers promoted via Instagram. Booking via DM.

website_need_signals: Discount promotions on Instagram only
No online booking for salon or academy
Makeup academy lacks online enrollment
businesses.observations: Salon and academy with dual revenue streams but no booking website. A site with service booking, course enrollment, and payment would streamline operations.

businesses.description: A wedding jewelry brand based in Kanpur offering custom-designed pieces. Customers discover them through Instagram and inquire about prices via DM.

website.quality_analysis: No website found. Listed on WedMeGood but operates primarily through Instagram. Customers find them via Instagram and check prices via DM.

website_need_signals: WedMeGood listing but no own website
Instagram as primary discovery platform
DM for price inquiries
businesses.observations: Wedding jewelry with high-value products but no e-commerce. A website with product catalog, pricing, and inquiry system would professionalize the brand for wedding-season buyers.

businesses.description: A beauty brand requiring customers to DM Instagram page to confirm availability before booking. Uses Squarespace scheduling but primarily drives bookings through Instagram.

website.quality_analysis: No dedicated website. Uses Squarespace scheduling but directs customers to DM Instagram first for availability confirmation.

website_need_signals: DM required before booking despite scheduling tool
No dedicated brand website
Booking process is fragmented
businesses.observations: Beauty business with fragmented booking process. A dedicated website with integrated booking, service menu, and payment would simplify the customer journey significantly.

businesses.description: One of Nepal's first professional wedding planning companies, established about 5 years ago. Assists with design, planning, and coordination of weddings.

website.quality_analysis: No website found. Despite being a pioneer in Nepali wedding planning, all business conducted via Instagram and phone.

website_need_signals: Pioneer wedding planner with no website
Instagram as only portfolio platform
High-value service lacking professional web presence
businesses.observations: Pioneer in Nepali wedding planning industry with strong brand recognition but no website. A professional portfolio site with service packages and inquiry system would match their market position.

businesses.description: A trekking agency operating in Nepal, Tibet, and Bhutan. Uses Instagram to promote trekking packages and adventure activities.

website.quality_analysis: No website found. Listed on Awesome Indie directory. Multi-country trekking services with no booking platform.

website_need_signals: Multi-country operations but no website
Directory listing as only web presence
No online booking despite international clientele
businesses.observations: Multi-country trekking operator with international clients but no website. A professional site with country-specific packages, online booking, and payment would significantly boost credibility.

businesses.description: An educational institution in Bhaktapur providing tutoring, career counseling, interview preparation, and online/offline training sessions for school and college students.

website.quality_analysis: Basic website exists but functionality is limited. Primarily informational. No online enrollment or course catalog.

website_need_signals: Website is basic and lacks e-learning features
No online enrollment system
Facebook as primary communication channel
businesses.observations: Small academy with basic web presence. A modern website with course listings, online enrollment, and student resources would attract more students in Bhaktapur.

businesses.description: An educational consultancy providing services to students aspiring for overseas qualifications. Uses Facebook as primary web presence with a LinkedIn company page.

website.quality_analysis: No website found. LinkedIn lists Facebook as the website URL. 11-50 employees but no dedicated website.

website_need_signals: Facebook page as primary website
LinkedIn lists Facebook as company website
11-50 employees but no web presence
businesses.observations: Established educational consultancy with staff but no website. A professional site with service listings, success stories, and inquiry forms would match their company size and ambition.

businesses.description: A travel agency based in Pokhara offering various travel packages and services for domestic and international travelers. Listed on GetYourGuide but lacks own website.

website.quality_analysis: No website found. Listed on GetYourGuide as supplier but no dedicated web presence for direct bookings.

website_need_signals: GetYourGuide listing as primary web presence
No direct booking website
Pokhara-based with tourism potential but no online platform
businesses.observations: Pokhara travel agency relying on third-party platforms. A dedicated website with tour packages and direct booking would reduce commission dependency and increase profit margins.

businesses.description: An e-learning platform offering online courses in Nepal through its digital platform. Listed on business directories but primarily operates through its own app.

website.quality_analysis: E-learning platform exists but primarily app-based. Web presence listed on BizPages but limited functionality.

website_need_signals: App-based learning with limited web presence
Web platform not fully developed
Social media drives traffic but web conversion is low
businesses.observations: Ed-tech platform with app focus but weak web presence. A responsive web platform would complement the app and capture users who prefer desktop learning.

businesses.description: An academic college in Kathmandu offering various educational programs. Has a basic website but primarily communicates via Facebook.

website.quality_analysis: Basic academic website exists but appears dated. Limited functionality for online enrollment or student portal.

website_need_signals: Dated website with limited functionality
No online enrollment or student portal
Facebook as primary communication channel
businesses.observations: Established academic institution with outdated website. A modern site with online enrollment, course information, and student resources would improve their digital presence.

businesses.description: An international education consultancy in Pokhara providing services to aspiring students. Has a basic website but primarily uses Facebook for student outreach.

website.quality_analysis: Basic consultancy website exists but functionality is limited. Primarily informational with contact details.

website_need_signals: Website is basic and not optimized for lead generation
Facebook as primary outreach tool
No online appointment booking for consultations
businesses.observations: Education consultancy with basic web presence. A lead-generation website with online consultation booking and success stories would attract more students.

businesses.description: A photography service provider in Bhutan offering travel, landscape, event, and cultural photography. Operates through Instagram and service directories without a dedicated website.

website.quality_analysis: No website found. Listed on Bhutan travel services directory. Portfolio only on Instagram.

website_need_signals: Directory listing as only web presence
No portfolio website
Instagram as sole photography showcase
businesses.observations: Photographer in tourism-heavy Bhutan with no portfolio website. A visual portfolio with service packages and booking would attract international clients seeking Himalayan photography.

businesses.description: An after-school program offering courses and learning opportunities. Has a website but primarily uses Facebook Messenger for student communication.

website.quality_analysis: Website exists with FAQ and course information. Messenger chat integration for inquiries but no enrollment system.

Messenger chat as primary inquiry method
No student portal or learning management
businesses.observations: After-school program with website but missing key functionality. Adding online enrollment, course catalog, and student dashboard would modernize operations.

businesses.description: An event planning and coordination service offering discounted packages for couples. Uses Instagram for promotions and client acquisition via DM.

No portfolio or service website
DM-based client acquisition
businesses.observations: Event planner using forums and Instagram for marketing but no website. A portfolio website with service packages would professionalize their brand and increase conversion.

website_need_signals: Relies on WhatsApp and Instagram for international orders
No centralized product catalog
Uses Linktree as makeshift website

businesses.description: A bakery and cafe in Dharan popular for cakes and baked goods, operating mainly through social media and phone orders.

Delivery orders handled manually

No ecommerce checkout

Social profiles used as main web identity
No booking or catalog system

businesses.description: A handmade Nepali natural products brand selling eco-friendly handmade items globally through Etsy and Instagram.

No independent ecommerce brand site
Strong storytelling not leveraged on own domain
businesses.observations: Already validated internationally via Etsy; likely ready for premium standalone brand website.

businesses.description: A Kathmandu-based cashmere and women's fashion business formerly known as NPI Collection.

No ecommerce catalog

businesses.description: A rapidly growing Nepal-made clothing brand delivering unisex apparel nationwide through Instagram.

Instagram-only ordering
Growing brand without owned digital infrastructure

businesses.description: A women's clothing store customizing handcrafted outfits and selling both online and physically through social media.

website_need_signals: Marketplace acting as substitute website
Customized clothing orders handled manually

common_patterns: No website despite significant Instagram following
WhatsApp/phone number in bio as only contact method
Linktree or third-party directory as makeshift web presence
Comment sections full of price inquiries
High engagement on social media but no conversion platform
Businesses with media coverage but no website to capture interest
Physical businesses with delivery services but no online ordering
Founders with compelling stories but no brand website
Multi-platform social presence without a central hub
biggest_problems: Complete dependency on Instagram for sales and customer communication
No online payment integration leading to manual cash-on-delivery processes
Missing booking and reservation systems for service businesses
Inability to capture customer data for remarketing
Lost international sales due to lack of e-commerce infrastructure
No SEO presence meaning zero organic search traffic
Brand credibility limited without a professional domain
No blog or content platform for content marketing
Manual inventory and order management causing scalability issues
Social media algorithm dependency risking business continuity
outreach_strategies: Audit their Instagram DM process and show time/cost savings with a website
Offer a free Instagram bio link audit highlighting missed sales opportunities
Create a mockup landing page using their Instagram content to demonstrate value
Share case studies of similar businesses that scaled with a website
Emphasize the risk of social media bans in Nepal and need for owned digital assets
Offer a phased approach: start with a simple landing page, then add e-commerce
Propose commission-based or revenue-share models for cash-strapped businesses
Bundle website with Instagram shop integration for seamless social commerce
Highlight SEO benefits: 'your customers are searching Google, not just Instagram'
Leverage local business directories to find warm leads already seeking digital help
analysis.approach_strategy_for_beginners: Start by identifying businesses with high Instagram engagement but no Linktree or website link in their bio. These are the most underserved leads. Reach out via Instagram DM with a friendly, non-salesy message: mention something specific you like about their products, note that you noticed they don't have a website, and offer a simple, affordable landing page solution. Emphasize that a website helps during Nepal's social media ban periods and builds long-term brand credibility. Begin with a low-cost 'Instagram Bio Website' package (a simple one-page site with product highlights, about section, and WhatsApp order button) priced affordably to build your portfolio. Once you deliver value, upsell to full e-commerce, booking systems, or SEO services. Target businesses with at least 3,000 followers and daily posting habits, as they have active customer demand but no system to capture it efficiently. Track your outreach in a simple spreadsheet and follow up once after 5 days if no response.
